name: C_RENT23561_001 - Open Create Object Modal
description: Verify the Create Object modal opens from the toolbar
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Objects view
steps: Click the "+ Create Object" button in the toolbar
expected_result: The Create Object modal is displayed with all fields empty

name: C_RENT23561_002 - Modal Title Displayed
description: Verify the modal heading reads "Create Object"
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Observe the modal header text
expected_result: The header text reads "Create Object"

name: C_RENT23561_003 - Name Field Present
description: Verify the Name input field is present in the modal
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Locate the Name input field inside the modal
expected_result: A text input labeled "Name" is visible and enabled

name: C_RENT23561_004 - Name Field Required Validation
description: Verify submitting with an empty Name shows an error
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Leave the Name field blank | Click "Save"
expected_result: An error message "Name is required" appears below the Name field

name: C_RENT23561_005 - Name Field Max Length
description: Verify the Name field enforces a maximum of 255 characters
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Enter 256 characters in the Name field | Click "Save"
expected_result: The input is truncated at 255 characters or a validation error is shown

name: C_RENT23561_006 - Type Dropdown Present
description: Verify the Object Type dropdown is visible
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Locate the Type dropdown in the modal
expected_result: A dropdown labeled "Type" is visible and enabled

name: C_RENT23561_007 - Type Dropdown Options
description: Verify the Type dropdown lists the expected object types
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Click the Type dropdown and observe the available options
expected_result: All expected object types are listed (Physical | Digital | Service)

name: C_RENT23561_008 - Type Field Required Validation
description: Verify submitting without selecting a Type shows an error
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open | Name has been filled
steps: Leave the Type dropdown at its default empty state | Click "Save"
expected_result: An error message "Type is required" is displayed

name: C_RENT23561_009 - Description Field Present
description: Verify the Description textarea is present
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Locate the Description textarea
expected_result: A textarea labeled "Description" is visible

name: C_RENT23561_010 - Description Field Optional
description: Verify the form saves successfully when Description is empty
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Fill in Name | Select Type | Leave Description blank | Click "Save"
expected_result: The object is created without errors; Description is stored as empty

name: C_RENT23561_011 - Cancel Button Closes Modal
description: Verify clicking Cancel closes the modal without saving
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open with some data entered
steps: Fill in the Name field | Click "Cancel"
expected_result: The modal closes and no new object is created

name: C_RENT23561_012 - ESC Key Closes Modal
description: Verify pressing Escape closes the modal
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Press the Escape key
expected_result: The modal closes without saving any data

name: C_RENT23561_013 - Save Button Creates Object
description: Verify clicking Save creates the object and closes the modal
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Enter a valid Name | Select a Type | Click "Save"
expected_result: The modal closes and the new object appears in the Objects list

name: C_RENT23561_014 - Duplicate Name Warning
description: Verify a warning is shown when an object with the same name already exists
preconditions: An object named "TestObject" already exists
steps: Enter "TestObject" in the Name field | Select a Type | Click "Save"
expected_result: A warning "An object with this name already exists" is displayed

name: C_RENT23561_015 - Save Spinner Displayed
description: Verify a loading spinner is shown while the save request is in progress
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open with valid data
steps: Click "Save" and observe the button state during the request
expected_result: A spinner or loading indicator is shown on the Save button while the API call is pending

name: C_RENT23561_016 - Error on API Failure
description: Verify an error message is displayed if the API call fails
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open | Server returns 500
steps: Enter valid data | Click "Save" | Simulate server error
expected_result: An error message "Failed to create object. Please try again." is displayed

name: C_RENT23561_017 - Folder Assignment Field
description: Verify the modal contains a Folder assignment field
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Locate the Folder field inside the modal
expected_result: A field labeled "Folder" is visible and allows selection

name: C_RENT23561_018 - Tags Field Present
description: Verify the Tags multi-select field is present
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Locate the Tags field
expected_result: A multi-select or tag-input labeled "Tags" is visible

name: C_RENT23561_019 - Tags Are Optional
description: Verify the form saves when no tags are selected
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Enter a valid Name | Select a Type | Leave Tags empty | Click "Save"
expected_result: The object is created successfully without any tags

name: C_RENT23561_020 - Multi-tag Selection
description: Verify multiple tags can be applied to one object
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Click the Tags field | Select three different tags | Click "Save"
expected_result: The new object is created with all three tags attached

name: C_RENT23561_021 - Modal Overlay Click Behavior
description: Verify clicking the background overlay does not close the modal with unsaved data
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open with data entered
steps: Click outside the modal on the overlay backdrop
expected_result: The modal remains open; a confirmation prompt may appear

name: C_RENT23561_022 - Keyboard Navigation
description: Verify all modal fields can be navigated using Tab
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Press Tab repeatedly from the Name field
expected_result: Focus moves through Name → Type → Description → Tags → Folder → Cancel → Save in order

name: C_RENT23561_023 - Form Reset on Reopen
description: Verify the modal fields are empty when reopened after Cancel
preconditions: The Create Object modal was opened and cancelled
steps: Reopen the Create Object modal
expected_result: All fields are empty and no previous input is retained

name: C_RENT23561_024 - Accessibility - ARIA Labels
description: Verify all modal form fields have appropriate ARIA labels
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Inspect each field for aria-label or aria-labelledby attributes
expected_result: All interactive form elements have ARIA labels matching their visible labels

name: C_RENT23561_025 - Object Created Event Emitted
description: Verify an objectCreated event is emitted after successful creation
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open | Event listener is attached
steps: Enter valid data | Click "Save"
expected_result: The objectCreated custom event is fired with the new object's ID

name: C_RENT23561_026 - Priority Field Present
description: Verify the Priority dropdown is shown in the modal
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Locate the Priority dropdown
expected_result: A dropdown labeled "Priority" is visible with options Low / Medium / High

name: C_RENT23561_027 - Default Priority Value
description: Verify the Priority dropdown defaults to Medium
preconditions: The Create Object modal is open
steps: Open the modal and observe the Priority dropdown initial value
expected_result: Priority defaults to "Medium" without user interaction

name: C_RENT23561_028 - Long Name Displays Correctly
description: Verify a 255-character Name is displayed without truncation in the list view
preconditions: An object with a 255-character name has been created
steps: Navigate to the Objects list | Locate the newly created object
expected_result: The full 255-character name is visible or shown with a tooltip on hover
